name: Heritage Classic
description: Traditional navy and gold medallion style with ornate flourishes and serif hierarchy.
prompt_modifier: classical engraved illustration, gilt ornament language, museum-grade heritage cover styling

name: Victorian Engraving
description: Etching-heavy composition with period texture and dramatic line work.
prompt_modifier: 19th-century steel engraving mood, etched linework, restrained sepia tonality

name: Minimalist
description: White space dominant, single focal image, clean sans-serif typography.
prompt_modifier: minimalist composition, generous negative space, one dominant focal element, understated elegance

name: Dark Thriller
description: Dark base, high contrast lighting, gritty texture and tense atmosphere.
prompt_modifier: dark cinematic atmosphere, high-contrast dramatic lighting, distressed texture, suspense mood

name: Literary Fiction
description: Muted painterly look with refined serif typography and emotional subtlety.
prompt_modifier: painterly literary cover style, muted atmospheric palette, nuanced symbolic focal art

name: Business/Non-Fiction
description: Clean grid layout, direct hierarchy, strong professional visual tone.
prompt_modifier: professional nonfiction composition, clear visual hierarchy, confident contemporary editorial feel

name: Children's Book
description: Bright palette, playful illustrated framing, rounded friendly typography.
prompt_modifier: vivid playful illustration style, friendly whimsical shapes, child-safe cheerful mood

name: Romance
description: Warm gradient overlays, intimate focal art, script-influenced title treatment.
prompt_modifier: romantic warm tones, intimate emotional storytelling, soft focus glow, elegant sensual composition

name: Sci-Fi/Fantasy
description: Epic world-building visuals with dramatic lighting and scale.
prompt_modifier: epic cinematic worldbuilding, cosmic scale, dramatic atmospheric lighting, futuristic mythic detail

name: Art Deco
description: Geometric ornament, metallic accents, poster-like period elegance.
prompt_modifier: art deco geometry, metallic flourishes, elegant symmetrical framing, period poster sophistication
